NL.R1: Before an order is being closed, records of the received orders have to be made.
NL.R2: After each production action a quality check has to be performed prior to delivery.
NL.R3: Before an order is being closed, either records of payments made or records of the fact that the order was rejected have to be taken. Each payment received shall be reported.
NL.R4: When an order is filled, a product has to be shipped and an invoice has to be sent.

Humanmade.R2: precedence('Ship', 'Test Quality') and leads_to('production step', 'Test Quality')
Humanmade.R3: precedence('Close Bill', 'Report Payment') and precedence('Close Bill', 'Report Rejected Order') and leads_to('Receive Payment', 'Report Payment')
Humanmade.R4: leads_to('Fill Order', 'Ship') and leads_to('Fill Order', 'Send Invoice')
